## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pytest` green; no test touches the network)
- [ ] If this touches a Plex/plex.tv WRITE path: I read `.claude/rules/plex-safety.md` and the
      change keeps snapshots, merge-not-rebuild, `dry_run`, and the `rowarr_*` ownership gate intact
- [ ] Docs updated in the same PR (README / docs/) if behavior changed
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`)
